since_last: 66% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +5.35%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.20% · BTC +2.26% · Gold +1.90% · Nasdaq100 -0.76%. 66% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +5.35%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +5.35%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.22%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +11.08%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +11.08%, META +10.78%, APP +10.53%, PLTR +9.13%, PATH +8.65%. Laggards: TER -9.29%, KLAC -8.96%, LRCX -7.88%, MU -7.65%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.67% at $161.18
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.67% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
